headline: Built for BetterCloud
subheadline: AI infrastructure to streamline multi-SaaS management and boost operational efficiency across global teams

challenges.title: Employee Decline
challenges.desc: BetterCloud faced a 24.9% YoY drop in employees, straining team capacity. This impacts daily operations in multi-country setups. It requires tools to automate workflows and retain talent.

challenges.title: Global Operations
challenges.desc: Managing teams across six countries adds complexity to communication and compliance. BetterCloud must align processes to avoid inefficiencies. This demands integrated systems for seamless collaboration.

challenges.title: SaaS Management
challenges.desc: BetterCloud's platform handles multi-SaaS environments, but monitoring changes is challenging. IT teams need to remediate issues quickly to maintain security. Automation is key to enforcing policies effectively.

challenges.title: Revenue Optimization
challenges.desc: With $31.4M in annual revenue, BetterCloud must streamline revenue operations amid growth pressures. Cross-team alignment is crucial to maximize efficiency. This involves data-driven tools to track and improve streams.

deliverables.title: SaaS Automation System
deliverables.desc: Builds automated workflows for BetterCloud's multi-SaaS platform to detect and remediate changes, integrating with existing IT tools for real-time monitoring

deliverables.title: Global Ops Framework
deliverables.desc: Develops a framework to manage operations across six countries, integrating with BetterCloud's systems to enhance collaboration and compliance

deliverables.title: Workforce Analytics Tool
deliverables.desc: Creates AI analytics to address the 24.9% employee decline, integrating with HR systems to track retention and productivity metrics

deliverables.title: Revenue Stream Optimizer
deliverables.desc: Designs a system to optimize $31.4M annual revenue by aligning teams and automating processes, integrating with sales infrastructure for better forecasting

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Research BetterCloud's current setup and identify key pain points like employee decline and global operations.

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop tailored AI infrastructure based on findings, focusing on SaaS management and revenue optimization.

engagementSteps.title: Deployment and Review
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Implement the systems and conduct initial reviews to ensure integration and performance improvements.

faqItems.question: What is this service?
faqItems.answer: It's customized AI sales infrastructure for BetterCloud to manage multi-SaaS environments.

faqItems.question: How does it address employee decline?
faqItems.answer: It builds analytics tools to track and improve retention amid BetterCloud's 24.9% YoY drop.

faqItems.question: Will it integrate with our platform?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it integrates seamlessly with BetterCloud's SaaS management systems for real-time operations.

faqItems.question: What are the costs?
faqItems.answer: Costs are based on BetterCloud's $31.4M revenue scale, with flexible pricing for global implementation.

faqItems.question: How long is the engagement?
faqItems.answer: The initial phase spans three months, covering assessment, build, and deployment.

faqItems.question: Is this secure for multi-country operations?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it ensures compliance and security across BetterCloud's six countries.

stackItems.name: BetterCloud Platform
stackItems.role: Manages multi-SaaS environments and automates IT workflows

stackItems.name: AWS
stackItems.role: Hosts and scales BetterCloud's infrastructure for global operations

stackItems.name: Google Workspace
stackItems.role: Facilitates collaboration across BetterCloud's teams in six countries

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Tracks revenue operations and customer data for BetterCloud's sales processes

stackItems.name: Slack
stackItems.role: Enables real-time communication to address operational challenges at BetterCloud
